kept.text:
Meta $META actually fell below $600 overnight LMAO.

Continues to be red day after day despite the market soaring.

Seems investors are concerned particularly about $META CapEx because of Zuckerberg’s bad history with CapEx.

Kinda makes sense kinda not tho.

profile_bio.description: Investing, Economics, News, Tech, Memes, Shenanigans, & Whatever Is Trending. NOT Financial Advice & Watch Out For Fake Accounts.

kept.text:
$META
Meta got rejected from the 61.8% retracement at $678.24, keeping the blue scenario valid for now. The structure still allows for a C-wave decline, but no confirmed impulsive move lower yet.

The decline from the April 17 high has only unfolded as a 3-wave move so far, which isn't enough to confirm wave B has topped. A clearer 5-wave decline on the micro level would strengthen the bearish case. Break above $693.30 and the blue microstructure gets invalidated.

Key support for the bullish interpretation sits between $553 and $600.

kept.text:
今年我的美股投资预期：

- 美股标普大盘回报率和 2025 持平 16%
- $META 股价突破历史新高，打破市场质疑，复刻去年 $GOOGL 剧本
- AI 基建产业链 GPU/CPU/内存/存储/光模块继续发力
- $CRCL 搭配 Clarity Act 法案顺利通过，股价回到 200+

其他无所求了，预期之外都是惊喜，祝大家今年都发财！
